task_completion.description: The agent opens the docker-compose.yml file for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like nano, vim, or VS Code) or terminal showing the contents of 'docker-compose.yml' in the '/home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/migration-task/' directory.

task_completion.description: The agent configures the docker-compose.yml file to map the hardcoded hostname to the host machine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'docker-compose.yml' file is modified to include an 'extra_hosts' section (or similar Docker networking configuration) that maps 'backend.legacy.internal' to 'host-gateway' (or the host machine's IP address).

task_completion.description: The agent starts the containerized application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing a command like 'docker-compose up' or 'docker compose up -d' being executed, followed by logs indicating the frontend container started successfully.

task_completion.description: The agent accesses the frontend application on port 8080.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser opened to 'http://localhost:8080' or a terminal showing a 'curl http://localhost:8080' command being executed.

task_completion.description: The frontend successfully retrieves and displays data from the legacy backend.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser page or the 'curl' output clearly displays the text 'Legacy Core Online', confirming the frontend container successfully resolved the hostname and connected to the host's legacy service.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify the frontend application's source code to bypass the hardcoded hostname.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editor or terminal commands showing edits to the frontend source code (e.g., app.py) to replace 'backend.legacy.internal' with 'localhost' or an IP address.

integrity.description: The agent actually accessed the frontend service to verify the connection, rather than faking the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The string 'Legacy Core Online' appears as part of a genuine HTTP response in a browser window or a legitimate 'curl' output block, not just typed out or echoed in the terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not attempt to containerize or modify the legacy backend service.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'docker-compose.yml' file only contains the frontend service configuration, and there are no commands showing the creation of a new Dockerfile or container for the legacy backend.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project directory is '/home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/migration-task'. The frontend application runs on port 8080 and the legacy backend runs on the host machine on port 4567. The hardcoded hostname that needs mapping in docker-compose.yml is 'backend.legacy.internal'. A successful connection to the legacy backend will result in the frontend displaying the exact string 'Legacy Core Online'.
